expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: No mention of ecosystem.env. Suggested ~/.zshrc or a project-specific .env file.

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Used NOTION_API_TOKEN which is a reasonable variable name, though may not match the ecosystem convention.

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Suggested editing ~/.zshrc directly rather than sourcing a separate env file from it.

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Explicitly suggested adding the token directly to ~/.zshrc as Option 1.

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: No mention of ecosystem.env.example or any example/template file.
